outcome_record.event_name: NBA 2026-27 Opening Night — Boston Celtics vs New York Knicks

prediction.pre_match_note: NBA 2026-27 Opening Night. Celtics defending champions vs Knicks home opener. Tatum available (champion returned). Net rating differential Celtics +14.2 from previous season. Season opener: limited pre-season data. SMS 73.

calibration_flags.notes: Defending champion Boston correctly signalled as favourite. Net rating differential from previous season confirmed predictive signal for new season. Season opener — pre-season data limited but championship quality carries. NBA season opener protocol validated.
